name: @fora/mcp-clickup
description: FORA ClickUp MCP server — exposes 8 tools (list_tasks, search_tasks, get_task, create_task, update_task, set_task_status, list_comments, add_comment) over MCP/stdio. Auth via ClickUp personal API token, pinned to a single List (CLICKUP_LIST_ID) for least-privilege scoping. Mirrors FORA-200 / @fora/mcp-jira.
